summary: Iteration 58 - Backend testing for Car Rental Images Support. All 10 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) POST /api/car-rental/ accepts images array with up to 6 URLs. 2) GET /api/car-rental/ returns vehicles with images array. 3) GET /api/car-rental/{id} returns single vehicle with images. 4) PUT /api/car-rental/{id} can update images. 5) Images field is optional (defaults to empty array). 6) All CRUD operations work correctly with images. Test data cleanup successful.

minor.issue: Function get_my_car_bookings is missing return statement - return statement appears after the next function definition (line 320 after function on line 275)
minor.note: Not related to images feature being tested

minor.issue: GET list endpoint returns _id field, but GET single endpoint returns id field - inconsistent response format
minor.note: Frontend handles both formats via (car.id || car._id)

create_vehicle_tests.test_01_create_vehicle_with_images_array: PASS - Successfully created vehicle with 3 images
create_vehicle_tests.test_02_create_vehicle_with_6_images: PASS - Successfully created vehicle with max 6 images
create_vehicle_tests.test_04_create_vehicle_without_images_fi: PASS - Images field is optional, defaults to empty

get_vehicle_tests.test_05_get_vehicles_list_returns_images: PASS - GET /api/car-rental/ returns vehicles with images array
get_vehicle_tests.test_06_get_single_vehicle_returns_image: PASS - GET /api/car-rental/{id} returns vehicle with 5 images

update_vehicle_tests.test_07_update_vehicle_images: PASS - PUT endpoint can update images successfully

data_persistence_tests.test_08_vehicle_data_persistence: PASS - All fields including images are properly persisted
data_persistence_tests.test_09_vehicle_filter_by_type_with_imag: PASS - Filtered vehicles include images field

cleanup_tests.test_10_cleanup_test_vehicles: PASS - DELETE endpoint works, vehicle returns 404 after deletion

features_verified.POST /api/car-rental/: VERIFIED - Accepts images array (0 to 6+ URLs)
features_verified.GET /api/car-rental/: VERIFIED - Returns vehicles list with images array
features_verified.GET /api/car-rental/{id}: VERIFIED - Returns single vehicle with images and transforms _id to id

critical_code_review_comments: CarRentalCreate and CarRentalUpdate models both support images: Optional[list] = [] field correctly
Images are stored as part of car document and returned in all GET responses
get_my_car_bookings function has unreachable return statement (line 320 after line 275 function)
Response format inconsistency: GET list returns _id, GET single transforms to id
seed_data_creation: Test vehicles created with TEST_ prefix and automatically cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified car rental images support in backend. POST/GET/PUT endpoints all handle images array correctly. CarRentalCreate model accepts images: Optional[list] = []. Frontend components (CarRentalResults, CarRentalDetails, CarRentalBooking) already have code to display images[0] as primary image. Note: get_my_car_bookings endpoint has a missing return statement bug (unrelated to images feature).
